features.title: Remove All Hardcoded Values
features.description: Find and eliminate hardcoded strings, magic numbers, URLs, and configuration values throughout the codebase
acceptanceCriteria: Replace hardcoded API endpoints with config constants
Move hardcoded colors to theme/color constants
Extract hardcoded status/priority values to enums
Replace hardcoded pagination limits with config
Move hardcoded date formats to constants
Extract hardcoded validation rules (min/max lengths) to schemas
Replace hardcoded default values with configuration
No magic numbers - all numeric constants named
All hardcoded strings in constants files, not inline

features.title: Fix All TODO/FIXME Comments
features.description: Address every TODO, FIXME, HACK, and XXX comment in the codebase - either implement or remove
acceptanceCriteria: Search entire codebase for TODO comments
Search entire codebase for FIXME comments
Search entire codebase for HACK comments
Search entire codebase for XXX comments
Implement legitimate TODOs that are still needed
Remove TODOs for features that won't be implemented
Replace temporary/hacky solutions with proper implementations
Document why remaining TODOs can't be fixed yet (if any)
Zero TODO/FIXME comments remain in production code

features.title: TypeScript Strict Mode Compliance
features.description: Ensure full TypeScript strict mode compliance with no any types or type assertions
acceptanceCriteria: Remove all `any` types from codebase
Remove unnecessary `as` type assertions
Fix all implicit any warnings
Add proper return types to all functions
Ensure all API responses are properly typed
Type all event handlers properly
Type all refs and forwardRefs properly
Fix strict null check violations
Enable strictest TypeScript config and verify no errors

features.title: Robust Error Handling
features.description: Implement comprehensive error handling with proper user feedback and logging
acceptanceCriteria: Replace all console.log with proper logger or remove
Handle all Promise rejections with catch blocks
Add error boundaries around all async components
Ensure API errors show user-friendly messages
Handle network failures gracefully with retry options
Add loading states for all async operations
Handle edge cases (empty arrays, null values, etc.)
Add proper error logging for debugging
No unhandled promise rejections in production code

features.title: Remove Dead Code and Unused Files
features.description: Delete unused components, functions, imports, and files throughout the project
acceptanceCriteria: Remove unused imports from all files
Delete unused components (check imports/exports)
Remove unused utility functions
Delete unused API routes and procedures
Remove unused constants and config values
Delete unused CSS/Tailwind classes
Remove unused dependencies from package.json
Remove commented-out code blocks
Verify build still works after cleanup

features.title: Component Code Quality
features.description: Refactor components for consistency, reusability, and clean code patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent prop naming across components
Extract inline styles to className with cn() utility
Refactor large components (>200 lines) into smaller ones
Ensure all components have proper TypeScript interfaces
Standardize event handler naming (onXxx)
Remove inline function definitions from JSX props
Extract complex logic to custom hooks
Ensure consistent file naming conventions
All components follow single responsibility principle

features.title: State Management Cleanup
features.description: Clean up state management - remove redundant state, fix prop drilling, optimize re-renders
acceptanceCriteria: Remove redundant state that can be derived from props
Replace prop drilling with context or store where appropriate
Optimize unnecessary re-renders with memo/useMemo
Ensure proper cleanup in useEffect hooks
Remove unused state variables
Standardize store naming conventions
Fix race conditions in async state updates
Ensure proper state initialization
All state updates follow immutable patterns

features.title: API Layer Refactoring
features.description: Clean up tRPC procedures, fix validation, standardize responses
acceptanceCriteria: Standardize all API response formats
Add missing Zod validation schemas
Fix inconsistent error handling in procedures
Remove duplicate query logic
Optimize database queries (N+1 issues)
Add proper authorization checks to all procedures
Standardize procedure naming conventions
Fix pagination cursor implementation
All procedures have proper input/output types

features.title: Critical Bug Fixes
features.description: Fix all known bugs and issues discovered during development
acceptanceCriteria: Fix any race conditions in async operations
Fix memory leaks in useEffect hooks
Fix broken keyboard shortcuts
Fix drag and drop issues
Fix form validation edge cases
Fix real-time sync conflicts
Fix auth session expiration handling
Fix mobile responsive issues
Test all features and log/fix any discovered bugs

features.title: Eliminate Console Errors and Warnings
features.description: Fix all console errors, warnings, and React strict mode warnings
acceptanceCriteria: Fix all React key prop warnings
Fix all hydration mismatch errors
Fix all unique 'id' attribute warnings
Fix all invalid prop warnings
Fix all accessibility warnings
Remove all console.error in production
Fix all 404 errors for static assets
Fix all CORS-related console warnings
Clean console on app load and navigation

features.title: Security Hardening
features.description: Audit and fix security vulnerabilities and best practices
acceptanceCriteria: Sanitize all user input before rendering
Validate all file uploads
Add rate limiting to API routes
Ensure proper auth checks on all sensitive operations
Remove any hardcoded secrets or tokens
Add CSRF protection where needed
Validate all query parameters
Secure all cookie settings
Run security audit with npm audit or similar

features.title: Performance Optimization
features.description: Optimize performance - bundle size, render performance, data fetching
acceptanceCriteria: Implement code splitting for routes
Optimize bundle size (analyze with @next/bundle-analyzer)
Add proper image optimization
Implement virtual scrolling for long lists
Optimize re-renders with React.memo
Add proper caching headers
Optimize database query performance
Implement proper prefetching strategies
Lighthouse performance score > 90

features.title: Test Implementation
features.description: Add unit tests, integration tests, and E2E tests for critical paths
acceptanceCriteria: Add unit tests for utility functions
Add tests for critical tRPC procedures
Add component tests for key UI components
Add E2E tests for auth flow
Add E2E tests for issue CRUD operations
Set up test database with fixtures
Achieve >70% code coverage
Add CI/CD pipeline for automated testing
All tests pass in CI environment

features.title: Code Documentation
features.description: Add comprehensive documentation - README, inline comments, API docs
acceptanceCriteria: Update README with setup instructions
Document all environment variables
Add JSDoc comments to complex functions
Document all tRPC procedures
Create component documentation
Add architecture decision records (ADRs)
Document database schema
Add troubleshooting guide
All public APIs documented

features.title: Final Quality Pass
features.description: Final verification that everything is production-ready
acceptanceCriteria: Run full test suite - all tests pass
Run `bun run build` with zero warnings
Run `bun run check` with zero errors
Run `bun run typecheck` with zero errors
Manual QA test of all critical user flows
Verify dark mode works correctly everywhere
Verify mobile responsive design
Check for any console errors in production build
Verify all environment variables documented
